text.title: PMBoK 7 and 8 Reference Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent output contains 'Integration Management', 'Cost Management', or 'Communications Management' as domain names.
antipattern.root-cause: These are PMBoK 6 knowledge areas; in PMBoK 7/8 they are integrated or renamed.
antipattern.fix: Regenerate with PMBoK 7/8 vocabulary explicitly pinned; reject outputs containing the old names.

antipattern.symptom: Agent applies EVM metrics to a pure-agile project with no scope or cost baseline.
antipattern.root-cause: EVM requires a baseline; SPI and CPI are undefined without one.
antipattern.fix: Use agile metrics (cycle time, flow efficiency, throughput) instead.

antipattern.symptom: 'RAG' used without spelling Red/Amber/Green on first use in PM contexts.
antipattern.root-cause: 'RAG' is also retrieval-augmented generation; abbreviation causes agents to hallucinate RAG retrieval references.
antipattern.fix: Spell out on first use; pin disambiguation in system prompt.
